chunks.text: ORDER SHEET IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH AT KARACHI CP D 345 of 2021 ____________________________________________________________ DATE ORDER WITH SIGNATURE OF JUDGE ____________________________________________________________ 1. For hearing of CMA No.1393/2021 2. For hearing of main case 17.03.2025 Mr. Salman Aziz, advocate for petitioner Mr. Muhabat Hussain Awan, advocate for respondent No.3 Mr. Pervaiz Ahmed Memon, advocate for respondents No.2 & 5 Mr. Muhammad Rashid Arfi, advocate for respondent No.6 Mr. Kashif Nazir, Assistant Attorney General Admittedly the assessment has been undertaken in the said facts and circumstances. While the petitioner remained at liberty to assail any assessment order in the statutory hierarchy if aggrieved no case remained to entertain this direct recourse in writ jurisdiction in this behalf. Petition is found to be misconceived, hence, dismissed. Judge Judge Amjad
